description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the stages static, build, test, and deploy, uses the ubuntu:jammy Docker image for most jobs and alpine:3.15.3 for the pages job, and sets GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_UBUNTU and GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_ALPINE variables. In the static stage add a style job that runs `apt-get -q update` and `apt-get -qy install astyle` in before_script, then executes `astyle --dry-run --options=.astylerc --formatted lib/*.cc lib/*.h include/gnuradio/leo/*.h | sed 's/^Formatted/ERROR: Unformatted/;T;q1'` to enforce code style. In the build stage add a docs job that runs a before_script installing software-properties-common, libboost-dev, libboost-date-time-dev, libboost-filesystem-dev, libboost-program-options-dev, libboost-system-dev, libboost-thread-dev, libboost-regex-dev, libboost-test-dev, swig, cmake, doxygen, gcc, gnuradio-dev, libconfig++-dev, libgmp-dev, liborc-0.4-0, liborc-0.4-dev, liborc-0.4-dev-bin, libsndfile1-dev, git, then executes `mkdir -p build`, `cd build`, `rm -rf *`, `cmake ..`, `make doxygen_target`, and always archives `build/docs/doxygen/html` as an artifact for one week. In the test stage add an ubuntu job that also installs the same dependencies plus `python3-gi`, runs `mkdir -p build`, `cd build`, `cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr ..`, `make`, `make install`, `ldconfig`, and finally `python3 -c "import gnuradio.leo"` to verify the Python bindings. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on tag refs, uses the alpine:3.15.3 image, moves the generated HTML with `mv build/docs/doxygen/html/ public/`, and publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
